diagrams.title: Two-Phase Locking Protocol
diagrams.description: Shows the growing and shrinking phases of 2PL with lock acquisition and release timeline
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental lock-based concurrency control protocol

diagrams.title: Wait-for Graph for Deadlock Detection
diagrams.description: Transaction nodes with directed edges showing which transaction is waiting for which lock
diagrams.purpose: Visualize deadlock detection through cycle identification

diagrams.title: Timestamp Ordering Protocol
diagrams.description: Timeline showing transaction timestamps and how read/write operations are validated

diagrams.title: Distributed Deadlock Scenario
diagrams.description: Two sites with transactions holding cross-site locks creating circular wait
diagrams.purpose: Understand how distributed deadlocks occur and detection approach

diagrams.title: Optimistic Concurrency Control Flow
diagrams.description: Three-phase OCC: read phase, validation phase, write phase with decision outcomes
diagrams.purpose: Understand OCC workflow and when transactions abort

visuals.title: Concurrency Control In Distributed Transactions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for concurrency control in distributed transactions
